title: DHFWS Dakshin Dinajpur Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 08 Dental Surgeon, Lab Technician, and Other Posts
description: The District Health & Family Welfare Samiti, Dakshin Dinajpur (DHFWS Dakshin Dinajpur) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 08 Dental Surgeons, Dental Technicians, Audiologist, Lab Technician, Clinical Psychologist, and Block Epidemiologist Jobs. Candidates who have completed their BDS, Any Degree, 12th, DMLT, BAMS, BUMS, BHMS, M.Sc., or Post-graduation can apply for the DHFWS Dakshin Dinajpur Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we ...
